problem id: 58730ca3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1)

examples:
  10100001 -> 01000010
  01001011 -> 10010110
  11011001 -> 10110010
  11011000 -> 10110000
  01101010 -> 11010100
  01110001 -> 11100010
  10111111 -> 01111110
  00101101 -> 01011010
  10100000 -> 01000000

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 00010100
